name: taruvi-refine-template
postCreateCommand: bash -lc '[ -f .mcp.json ] || cp .mcp.example.json .mcp.json; [ -f .env ] || cp .env.example .env; mkdir -p .codex/projects; source /usr/local/share/nvm/nvm.sh; nvm install 22; nvm use 22; npm install; command -v codex >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm install -g @openai/codex'

postAttachCommand.app: bash -lc 'source /usr/local/share/nvm/nvm.sh; nvm install 22; nvm use 22; [ -d node_modules ] || npm install; npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173'
postAttachCommand.codex: bash -lc 'source /usr/local/share/nvm/nvm.sh; nvm install 22; nvm use 22; command -v codex >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm install -g @openai/codex; [ -f .env ] && set -a && source .env && set +a; export CODEX_HOME=${CODEX_HOME:-$PWD/.codex}; mkdir -p "$CODEX_HOME/projects"; AUTH_PATH=project-code/.codex/auth.json; if [ ! -f "$AUTH_PATH" ]; then echo "please copy auth.json to $AUTH_PATH and press Enter"; read -r; fi; codex'
